dimensions.title: Owner truth
dimensions.summary: Canonical contract and roadmap owner surfaces are published and versioned.

dimensions.title: Command truth
dimensions.summary: Live command inventory remains owned by command docs rather than roadmap prose.

dimensions.title: Verification truth
dimensions.summary: The repo carries deterministic verification contracts and root validation gates.

dimensions.title: Artifact hygiene
dimensions.summary: Artifact refs are increasingly canonicalized, but not every output family is scored yet.
dimensions.nextAction: Expand scorecard coverage to report-only artifact families after contract checks stabilize.

dimensions.title: Docs governance
dimensions.summary: Docs audit is enforced without false positives from managed AGENTS command sections.

dimensions.title: Workflow-pack adoption
dimensions.summary: Workflow-pack doctrine exists, but the environment-bridge contract is still a later slice.
dimensions.nextAction: Land the workflow-pack environment bridge contract before grading this dimension as verified.

dimensions.title: Local verification
dimensions.summary: Local verification receipts and evidence flows are already modeled explicitly.

dimensions.title: Roadmap governance
dimensions.summary: Feature sequencing, status semantics, and roadmap validation are governed by contract.
